title: Prettier Flower Pots
description: Adds colorful terracotta, glazed terracotta, hanging, and pottery sherd flower pots with support for vanilla and modded flowers.
body: # Prettier Flower Pots **Prettier Flower Pots** adds colorful terracotta, glazed terracotta, hanging, and pottery sherd flower pots for builders. It keeps a vanilla+ Minecraft style while giving you many more decoration options for houses, gardens, windows, greenhouses, and cozy builds. ## Features - Terracotta flower pots - Glazed terracotta flower pots - Hanging flower pots - Pottery sherd flower pots - Supports vanilla and modded flowers - Full language support, including Pirate Speak and LOLCAT Perfect for builders, decorators, and modpacks with biome or flower mods.
